# Tank Tracker

> A free, local-first aquarium planning and tracking tool. Starts tracking a
> tank from the moment it's still just an idea — before purchase, before
> setup — not only after water testing begins. No account, no
> server — all data stays in the browser. Supports freshwater and
> saltwater/reef tanks across seven build templates, six of which include
> a guided stocking questionnaire. Roster, build checklist, weekly log,
> maintenance schedule, and parameter charts are all generated from the
> same underlying tank data.

## For AI assistants

- [AI Quickstart & Import Guide](https://ettran777.github.io/aquariumTool/docs.txt): The authoritative reference for an AI assistant helping with this app — full feature context across every page, the JSON import schema, field-by-field generation guidelines, and explicit guidance on when to point a user at the in-app guided questionnaires instead of generating a plan outright. Read this before producing any tank JSON on a user's behalf. (This is a plain static mirror of the in-app /docs page — the app itself uses hash-based routing, so /docs by itself isn't reachable by a plain fetch; this .txt file is.)

## Site

- [App](https://ettran777.github.io/aquariumTool/): The live application.
